pr.title: Submission: 11L NTK-RoPE + FA3 + Batch524K + XSA4 + EMA (val_bpb=1.1328)

output.summary: 11L transformer taps NTK-aware RoPE scaling, FlashAttention 3, EMA, XSA on upper layers, and adaptive pruning to hit many steps within the 16MB budget.
techniques: NTK-aware RoPE auto-scaling beyond training length
FlashAttention 3 with Batch524K to boost steps in 600s
EMA plus adaptive pruning and XSA heads to fit the 16MB artifact limit
